criterion: After compaction, manager confirms guardrails survived.
rationale: Deferred because this drill uses dry-run compact/clear to validate guardrail auditability without changing worker context.

criterion: Receipt includes current status, next surviving steps, known risks, and acceptance criteria.
proof: Worker capture and durable handoff include current status, next surviving steps, known risks, and acceptance criteria.

criterion: No files, branches, commits, PRs, dependency installs, direct /compact, or direct /clear actions are performed by the worker.
proof: Worker capture shows status-only behavior; git status changed only by QA evidence files; compact and clear requests were dry-run through workerctl, not direct worker actions.

criterion: After clear, manager confirms no unintended work occurred.
rationale: Deferred because this drill uses dry-run compact/clear to validate guardrail auditability without changing worker context.
